scripts.dev:stop: kill $(cat .dev-server.pid 2>/dev/null) 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'next dev' 2>/dev/null; rm -f .dev-server.pid; echo 'Servidor parado'
scripts.dev:fresh: npm run dev:stop; sleep 1; next dev -p 3000
scripts.zip:share: cd .. && zip -r Reverse-compartir.zip Reverse -x 'Reverse/node_modules/*' -x 'Reverse/.next/*' -x 'Reverse/.git/*' -x 'Reverse/.cursor/*' -x '*.DS_Store' && mv Reverse-compartir.zip Reverse/ && echo 'Creado: Reverse/Reverse-compartir.zip'
